phrases.cultural_note: The hotel's grand entrance is famously set back from the main street, which can be confusing for first-time visitors.

likely_response.local: Kousek od řeky, hlavní vchod je vzadu.
likely_response.translation_en: A short way from the river, the main entrance is set back.

responses.english: A short way from the river, the main entrance is set back.
responses.french: Kousek od řeky, hlavní vchod je vzadu.

phrases.intent_en: How do I reach Dvořákovy sady?
phrases.text_local: Jak se dostanu do Dvořákových sadů?
phrases.cultural_note: The park is on a terrace above the river, and the stairs leading up from the colonnade area are the most direct pedestrian access.

likely_response.local: Po schodech za kolonádou nahoru do parku.
likely_response.translation_en: Up the stairs behind the colonnade into the park.

responses.english: Up the stairs behind the colonnade into the park.
responses.french: Po schodech za kolonádou nahoru do parku.

phrases.text_local: Kde je posezení v kavárně u řeky?
phrases.cultural_note: Many cafés along Stará Louka have terraces that extend right to the riverbank, offering views of the Teplá.

likely_response.local: Zahradní posezení je hned u vody vlevo.
likely_response.translation_en: The garden seating is right by the water on the left.

responses.english: The garden seating is right by the water on the left.
responses.french: Zahradní posezení je hned u vody vlevo.

phrases.cultural_note: The Jan Becher Museum is a dedicated building, not just a room; referencing the side entrance is a common local direction.

likely_response.local: V muzeu, vchod z boční ulice vlevo.
likely_response.translation_en: In the museum, entrance from the side street on the left.

responses.english: In the museum, entrance from the side street on the left.
responses.french: V muzeu, vchod z boční ulice vlevo.

phrases.intent_en: Where can I buy spa wafers?
phrases.text_local: Kde si můžu koupit lázeňské oplatky?
phrases.cultural_note: Street vendors selling fresh oplatky are a common and beloved sight along the main colonnades and riverfront.

likely_response.local: Přímo na promenádě u řeky je stánek.
likely_response.translation_en: Right on the promenade by the river there is a stall.

responses.english: Right on the promenade by the river there is a stall.
responses.french: Přímo na promenádě u řeky je stánek.
